recommendations.rationale: Tencent is firming in a risk-on tape but remains below its 60-day average, so existing exposure can be held while waiting for stronger confirmation.
evidence: Closed at 558.5 HKD, up 2.009% on the day
Price is above the 20-day moving average of 527.925 but below the 60-day moving average of 576.925
60-day range position is mid-range at 0.4313 with range regime flag
risks: Volume ratio of 0.8386 shows the rally was not strongly confirmed by above-average participation
Failure to reclaim the 60-day moving average could keep the stock range-bound
recommendations.invalidation: Downgrade if price closes back below the 20-day moving average or if market risk state turns risk-off.

recommendations.rationale: Alibaba bounced with the market but remains in a downtrend and near the lower part of its 60-day range, so it is a watch-only turnaround candidate.
evidence: Closed at 134.0 HKD, up 1.132% on the day
Price is below both the 20-day moving average of 140.09 and the 60-day moving average of 150.7733
60-day range position is low at 0.1631 with downtrend regime flag
risks: Downtrend remains intact despite the one-day bounce
Volume ratio of 0.6097 indicates weak participation
recommendations.invalidation: Upgrade only if price reclaims the 20-day moving average on improving volume; avoid if it breaks below the recent 60-day range low.

recommendations.rationale: Xiaomi led the watchlist with a high-volume breakout above its 20-day average, making it the strongest tactical buy candidate if follow-through appears.
evidence: Closed at 35.2 HKD, up 5.642% on the day
Volume ratio was elevated at 1.4836 versus the 20-day average
Price closed above the 20-day moving average of 34.408 while still below the 60-day moving average of 36.4973
risks: Still below the 60-day moving average, so the broader trend has not fully repaired
Sharp one-day move may invite short-term profit-taking
recommendations.invalidation: Invalidate the buy-candidate setup if price closes back below the 20-day moving average or volume dries up on follow-through attempts.

recommendations.rationale: The broad Hong Kong ETF participated in the rebound but remains below key moving averages, so broad-market exposure should wait for trend repair.
evidence: Closed at 26.12 HKD, up 1.555% on the day
Price remains below the 20-day moving average of 26.357 and the 60-day moving average of 26.5833
Regime flag is downtrend despite above-average volume ratio of 1.1464
risks: Broad-market downtrend may persist if index fails to reclaim moving averages
Lagged technology ETFs and Xiaomi during a risk-on session
recommendations.invalidation: Upgrade only after a close above both 20-day and 60-day moving averages; avoid fresh exposure if price loses the recent lower range.

recommendations.rationale: Hang Seng Tech ETF is stabilizing around its 20-day average in a risk-on tape, supporting measured accumulation rather than aggressive buying.
evidence: Closed at 4.998 HKD, up 2.628% on the day
Close is essentially at the 20-day moving average of 4.995
Volume ratio of 1.0722 shows modestly above-average participation
risks: Price remains below the 60-day moving average of 5.3378
60-day range position of 0.2839 indicates recovery is still early
recommendations.invalidation: Stop accumulating if price closes below the 20-day moving average for multiple sessions or if tech-sector breadth weakens.

recommendations.rationale: The iShares Hang Seng TECH ETF mirrors the tech rebound and sits just above its 20-day average, making it suitable for gradual accumulation with confirmation required.
evidence: Closed at 10.71 HKD, up 2.685% on the day
Close is slightly above the 20-day moving average of 10.702
Part of the day’s leaders list in a risk-on market summary
risks: Volume ratio of 0.8315 is below average, weakening confirmation
Price remains below the 60-day moving average of 11.434
recommendations.invalidation: Stop accumulating if price falls back below the 20-day moving average or fails to improve volume on further gains.
